appliedUpdates.description: Documented Windows/WSL path translation guidance for invoking .factory/init.sh with bash in .factory/library/environment.md.
Documented Astro scoped-style caveat for Markdown/MDX descendants rendered by <Content /> in .factory/library/architecture.md.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Add Windows-specific dev-server stabilization guidance for browser validation sessions (e.g., PowerShell Start-Process workflow and healthcheck expectations).
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: cross-area-integration-and-vercel-readiness reviewer observed repeated startup recovery attempts before stable server launch; existing guidance does not include this fallback.
